qa_pair.question: Without listing any cubes or dimensions, identify the friendly server name returned by this TM1 instance's server-info endpoint. Answer with the exact server name.

Examine the rules text of the cube named Cube_PnL_Integration. Inside its rules section, how many DISTINCT OTHER cubes are referenced via DB() function calls (do not count any reference to Cube_PnL_Integration itself)? Answer with a single integer.

Among the non-control cubes that have rules defined in this server, exactly one cube's rules text contains a DB() call back into the same cube (a self-reference). Provide that cube's name (case-sensitive).

The Employee dimension exposes more than one hierarchy. The primary hierarchy contains 89 elements; one of the alternate hierarchies contains exactly 88 elements. Provide the name of the 88-element hierarchy (case-sensitive).

Inspect the Account dimension's primary hierarchy. Exactly one numeric leaf element has no parent (it does not roll up into PersonnelCost, SubcontractorExpense, ITCost, or any other consolidation). Provide the exact element name.
The Currency dimension contains a numeric leaf element that is deliberately excluded from the Total_Currency consolidation (it has no parent). Provide its exact name (case-sensitive).

There is exactly one user chore scheduled in this server. Use the chore call-graph analysis tool to determine which LITERAL value flows down through the chore's task chain into the pVersion parameter of the validation process it ultimately invokes. Provide the literal value (case-sensitive, no quotes).

The configuration-defaults setup process for the HRPlan model seeds default values into the HRPlan config cube only when those cells are empty. One of the defaults it sets is the CSV column delimiter character. Provide the single character it uses.

Three TI processes load data into the Cube_Assumptions cube and share a common name prefix: one canonical loader plus two suffixed copy variants. The canonical loader writes cells with CellPutN. Identify the cell-write function name that BOTH copy variants invoke (in addition to anything else they may call). Provide just the function name (case-sensitive).
The compliance-calculation process writes two distinct numeric measures into Cube_Compliance. One of them is named DaysCumulative. Provide the exact name of the OTHER measure (case-sensitive).
